---
title: "Alumni"
subtitle: "Former BioMIND researchers"
description: "Alumni of BioMIND's member labs, now in academia, industry, and government."
---

BioMIND alumni have moved on to positions in academia, industry, government, and the nonprofit sector. We are proud of their contributions to research at UCF and beyond.

::: {.bm-callout .bm-callout-gold}
**Alumni records are being compiled.** Former students, postdocs, and visiting researchers are invited to share their current position and a short note. Email the cluster coordinator or open a pull request against `people/alumni.qmd`.
:::

## PhD Alumni

| Name | Year | Lab | Current Position |
|------|------|-----|------------------|
| *Alumna/Alumnus Name* | 20XX | Lab | Position, Organization |
| *Alumna/Alumnus Name* | 20XX | Lab | Position, Organization |

## Master's Alumni

| Name | Year | Lab | Current Position |
|------|------|-----|------------------|
| *Alumna/Alumnus Name* | 20XX | Lab | Position, Organization |
| *Alumna/Alumnus Name* | 20XX | Lab | Position, Organization |

## Undergraduate Alumni

| Name | Year | Lab | Next Step |
|------|------|-----|-----------|
| *Alumna/Alumnus Name* | 20XX | Lab | Graduate program / Position |
| *Alumna/Alumnus Name* | 20XX | Lab | Graduate program / Position |

## Postdoctoral and Visiting Researchers

| Name | Years | Lab | Current Position |
|------|-------|-----|------------------|
| *Researcher Name* | 20XX–20XX | Lab | Position, Organization |

::: {.bm-callout}
**Editing.** Alumni entries can be added directly to the tables in `people/alumni.qmd`. Categories can be split further (by lab, by year, by sector) as the list grows.
:::
